top_stories.headline: China's Response to Events in the Middle East

facts.text: China is currently observing the situation in the Middle East as it develops.
No immediate impact on China has been reported as a result of the conflict.

top_stories.headline: Departure of Noem from Homeland Security

facts.text: Kristi Noem served as the Secretary of Homeland Security in the Trump administration.
She faced backlash during her tenure.
Donald Trump has decided to cut ties with Noem regarding her role in the administration.

top_stories.headline: US and Venezuela to Resume Diplomatic Relations

facts.text: The US and Venezuela have agreed to resume diplomatic ties.
The agreement follows the capture of Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro and his wife by US forces.

top_stories.headline: Hungary to Expel Ukrainian Bank Workers

facts.text: Hungarian authorities detained workers from a Ukrainian bank on suspicion of money laundering.
Hungary announced plans to expel these workers amid a dispute with Ukraine.

optional_reflection: In times of uncertainty, may we seek truth with humility and share it with grace. Lord, grant us wisdom to see clearly, courage to speak honestly, and compassion for those whose stories we carry today. Amen.
